title: Webinar by Mr. Sandeep Rajoriya
content: Oct, 23 2021 at 11:00 am GMeet Webinar by Mr. Sandeep Rajoriya Mr. Sandeep Rajoriya, an alumnus of the 2015 batch. In his third year of engineering, while working on a few University projects, he acquired a strong interest in Civil Services, and instead of pursuing a traditional campus placement, he began preparing for his UPSC journey. He secured an AIR - 290 in UPSC CSE 2020 and was recently felicitated by the Chief Minister and the Education Minister of Madhya Pradesh for his achievement. <
